overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character walking through ancient Alexandria at night. The character descends from a temple area, proceeds through narrow torch-lit streets, and crosses a bridge with triumphal arches while the Lighthouse of Alexandria is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard transitioning to residential street

events.description: turns right from temple courtyard onto narrow cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: walking down stone steps and turning right onto the street, passing by an ancient temple building

entered.detail: large stone building with columns and lit torch on the upper level
worn stone steps leading down from the temple area
tall pole with red banners visible against the night sky
burning torch mounted on the temple wall providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The segment begins near an ancient temple building with classical columns and a burning torch. The character walks down worn stone steps and turns right onto a cobblestone street. The area is sparsely populated with the night sky partially visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow walled street with torch lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the enclosed street lined with high stone walls and regularly spaced torches

notable_agents.action: civilian pedestrian walking toward the character in the opposite direction

entered.detail: high stone walls lining both sides of the narrow street
burning torches mounted on the walls providing the primary light source

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a narrow, enclosed street flanked by high stone walls. Burning torches mounted on the walls cast warm orange light against the cool blue night. The street is mostly empty with occasional pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open approach to triumphal arch bridge

events.description: exits narrow street into open plaza approaching the triumphal arch monument

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large triumphal arch that spans the bridge ahead

entered.detail: massive stone archway with burning braziers on top, marking the entrance to the bridge
tall palm trees lining the right side of the approach
ancient lighthouse visible in the distance with smoke rising from the top

segments.scene_description: The street opens up into a wide plaza as the character approaches a massive triumphal arch with burning braziers on its roof. Palm trees line the path and the famous Lighthouse of Alexandria becomes visible in the distance on the right, with smoke rising from its beacon.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge with triumphal arches and classical statues

events.description: passes through the first triumphal arch and continues onto the bridge

agents.ego_description: crossing the bridge passing through the series of triumphal arches toward the lighthouse

entered.detail: classical white marble statues positioned along the bridge railings
second archway visible through the first one, further along the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the bridge lined with classical marble statues, passing through the large triumphal arch. The Lighthouse of Alexandria stands prominently closer on the right as the character continues toward a second arch in the distance, with the open night sky fully visible above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the secluded heights of a temple complex down into the expansive, torch-lit urban landscape of ancient Alexandria at night. It begins beside classical columns and a burning torch, descending worn stone steps before turning onto a quiet cobblestone street. As the character proceeds, the environment tightens into a narrow corridor flanked by high stone walls where warm orange torchlight contrasts with the cool blue of the night sky. The scene then opens into a wide plaza lined with palm trees, revealing the distant Lighthouse of Alexandria with smoke rising from its beacon. Finally, the camera follows the character across a bridge of marble statues and through a massive triumphal arch, bringing the towering lighthouse into prominent view under a clear, open sky.
